title: DHAIQC 48 PCS Vintage Floral Paper Plates 17.8 cm, Scalloped Flower Party Plates Disposable Cake Dessert Plates for Afternoon Tea Birthday Bridal Shower Baby Shower Wedding Party Decorations (Floral)
features: Package Contents: This set includes 48 pieces of floral paper plates in 6 elegant patterns, featuring a charming scalloped edge design. Each plate measures 7 inches, perfect for desserts and snacks. The delicate floral prints and vibrant colors will elevate your table setting, making every occasion special.

Elegant Design: Our disposable floral plates showcase beautiful, intricate flower patterns in a variety of vibrant hues. The scalloped edges add an extra touch of elegance, making them ideal for tea parties, bridal showers, and garden gatherings. These plates will brighten any table with their eye-catching appeal.

Premium Quality: Made from thick, sturdy paper, these 7-inch plates are durable and resistant to bending or breaking. The high-quality material ensures they can hold a variety of party foods, from light snacks to hearty desserts, without compromising stability.

Hassle-Free Cleanup: After your event, simply dispose of these floral paper plates—no washing needed! Their convenient disposable design saves time on cleaning, so you can focus on enjoying the celebration with your guests.
Versatile Use: Perfect for birthdays, picnics, weddings, bridal showers, baby showers, and more, these scalloped-edge plates add a festive and elegant touch to any gathering.
description: Product Description Transform your special occasions with these charming vintage floral paper plates. Each set includes 48 delightful plates featuring an elegant scalloped design adorned with beautiful floral patterns, perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to your gatherings. Measuring 17.8 cm in diameter, these plates are ideally sized for serving desserts, cake, and light refreshments at afternoon teas, birthday celebrations, bridal showers, baby showers, or wedding receptions. The classic design combines timeless appeal with modern convenience, making them a lovely choice for both formal and casual events. The sturdy construction ensures reliable performance during your festivities, while the decorative edge adds an extra layer of refinement to your table setting. These disposable plates offer both style and practicality, allowing hosts to spend more time enjoying their events and less time washing up. Whether you're planning an intimate garden party or a grand celebration, these plates will complement your décor beautifully.
